items.title: ‘Words can’t describe my love for him’ – Dan Burn wins over fans with ‘most English challenge ever’ in cameo vs Norway
items.summary: DAN BURN needed just 11 minutes to remind England fans exactly why they adore him so much. The Newcastle defender came on in the 111th minute in England's 2–1 win against Norway, as Jude Bellingham's superb double completed a comeback from Erling Haaland's first-half opener.
